text.message: dang, now i see what i should have done. oh well
for 8-4-10/8-3-4 player, i think i'm likely stook with 8-3 or 8-4 :(
that's why i wrote what i did
i think whole board gettin locked up
i wrote it before you placed
Didn’t read your message till after
i think i can leave it blue, sorry for confusion
i'm sure i'll trade that soon
lol, just kills my hand now
i'll just try and get it later, ya don't have to save it
im willing to trade a city for road settle if anyone ever has the cards and wants to deal
nvm, we just block blue for the rest of the game now
You locked up the whole middle
and that justifies taking me out of the game completely?
If you went 3/10/11 to eight wood you would have had more options
i would need army and 4vps to win now, which just aint happening
ive done that once in my 2k games lol
lol with 4 held devs already out, doubt that
sorry black, i think i gotta do this.  it's my best settle...
black doesnt care, they wouldve protected it if they did
may as well get to popping
Black stronger than me, not that oj cares
i mean blue, give a player 0% chance of winning, everything that comes next is on you
i agree, part of this game is diplomacy
you could rb to the 6-2 or maybe 8-3
You blocked off all the ore
but no need to play it
ill trade for wheat if anyone is selling
you shouldnt be extorting in this spot
good idea not to trade with red
my bad, will just rob you next time i need ore
this way i get a free nb
the counter-play to over extortion is nonbinding
yeah, won't feel bad about robbing you then
ill trade all my ore for black then
uh, guess you can king make if ya want.  lol
cant threaten someone who has no chance of winning
only if i pull vps, but pretty surre 2 are already out
so i dont have a chance
lol, you could have traded for road mats early on too to protect yourself
if red wants to rob me instead of black, thats on them
i'll see what's needed given you don't honor deals
its catan mate, only chumps honour bad deals
ye no one owes anything here, but each action has a counter action
fair enough, but then we know not to trust you
nbs are usually long gone at this stage
only chumps think "trust" matters in catan
he just rolled wheat, i'd block one of the wood hexes if i were you black
4 sheep is a good block too
lol, dude lies, why even ask.
but at least theres still 4 in the deck
wow!  blue!  you have been forgiven!
We are all pawns in ojs plan
The five wood only hurts me
If you worried about oj then block them
so 5 ore good block for them
yeah oj could easily be on 9 here
im not on 9 tho, and even if i was, still need another vp
honestly, you kinda want me with 3vps, coz its gg if anyone else gets em
i probabyl should have gone for the ore to pop there.  dang.  my own fault too i they win.  lol
blue and black can each ahev one.  that ok wit me
you could have monoed for it :)
